notes.note: Flagship agent failure: a coherent-looking record assembled entirely from OTHER vendors' payment docs. Caught because a human noticed none of the evidence URLs mentioned 'Paygent'.
Evidence contamination: one citation was support.goconsensus.com — 'Consensus' the sales-demo tool, a different company than consensus.app.
Evidence contamination: cited an Apollo.io help article about Apollo's own 'Waterfall Enrichment' feature, not waterfall.io the company.

Verifier over-correction: the re-ask answered for core Salesforce (free Developer Edition) instead of Commerce Cloud, flipping a correct 'gated' verdict to 'self-serve'. Human arbitration restored it.
Verifier over-correction: the re-ask matched Mermaid Chart (a SaaS with API keys) instead of the local mermaid-cli npm tool.
GoHighLevel's evidence came from help-center and community posts rather than the official dev portal; the conclusions still verified as correct.
Composio ships one unified 'zoho' suite toolkit (57 tools incl. CRM); counted as coverage for Zoho CRM.
Targeted deep-dive that PASSED: fanbasis really does have self-serve API keys at apidocs.fan — the human's suspicion was wrong, the agent was right.
Targeted deep-dive that mostly PASSED: MrScraper really has a free plan with 1,000 API tokens.
